title: tanacetum trifidum
intro: Tanacetum trifidum, also known as three-lobed tansy or white pyrethrum, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Tanacetum trifidum has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum trifidum can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine and skincare products.
